description: Using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset, create a bar chart showing 'Sales' by 'Ship Mode'. Configure the 'Ship Mode' dimension with a custom sort order representing shipping speed: Same Day, First Class, Second Class, and Standard Class. Apply 'Ship Mode' to the color visualization and title the chart 'Revenue by Service Level'. Save the workbook as 'LogicalSort_Fulfillment' to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\.
